previous_blocker: Hermes LLM one-shot hit HTTP 429 before Composio schema tool execution.
resolution: Used Hermes MCP internals to call COMPOSIO_SEARCH_TOOLS and COMPOSIO_GET_TOOL_SCHEMAS directly without exposing credentials.

schema_findings.YOUTUBE_UPLOAD_VIDEO: requires title, description, tags, categoryId, privacyStatus, videoFilePath{name,mimetype,s3key}
schema_findings.YOUTUBE_MULTIPART_UPLOAD_VIDEO: requires title, description, categoryId, privacyStatus, videoFile{name,mimetype,s3key}
schema_findings.YOUTUBE_UPDATE_VIDEO: requires video_id; accepts title, description, tags, category_id, privacy_status
schema_findings.YOUTUBE_LIST_CHANNELS: accepts mine=true for authenticated channel read-only validation
schema_findings.YOUTUBE_GET_CHANNEL_STATISTICS: accepts mine=true for authenticated channel read-only statistics

limitations: Raw HH local media paths cannot be sent directly to Composio YouTube upload tools; a Composio file object or file bridge is required before Prompt 16 production upload.
Raw local thumbnail paths cannot be sent directly to YOUTUBE_UPDATE_THUMBNAIL; a thumbnailUrl is required.
